'''jathapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ohmefentanyl|ohmefentanyl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-th-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ohmefentanyl|ohmefentanyl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jathapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæthæpæth|jæthæpæth]] || [[word:jæthæpæj|jæthæpæj]] || [[word:jæthæpæsh|jæthæpæsh]] || [[word:jæthæpæ|jæthæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jathathapath|jathathapath]] || [[word:jathathapaj|jathathapaj]] || [[word:jathathapash|jathathapash]] || [[word:jathathapa|jathathapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jathapath|jathapath]] || [[word:jathapaj|jathapaj]] || [[word:jathapash|jathapash]] || [[word:jathapa|jathapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jathafpafth|jathafpafth]] || [[word:jathafpafj|jathafpafj]] || [[word:jathafpafsh|jathafpafsh]] || [[word:jathafpaf|jathafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jathapatha|jathapatha]] || [[word:jathapaja|jathapaja]] || [[word:jathapasha|jathapasha]] || [[word:jathapaka|jathapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jathapath|jathapath]] || [[word:jathapaj|jathapaj]] || [[word:jathapash|jathapash]] || [[word:jathapa|jathapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jathapathal|jathapathal]] || [[word:jathapajal|jathapajal]] || [[word:jathapashal|jathapashal]] || [[word:jathapakal|jathapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jathapaathatha|jathapaathatha]] || [[word:jathapaajaja|jathapaajaja]] || [[word:jathapaashasha|jathapaashasha]] || [[word:jathapaaka|jathapaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jathapathan|jathapathan]] || [[word:jathapajan|jathapajan]] || [[word:jathapashan|jathapashan]] || [[word:jathapakan|jathapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jathapathaoro|jathapathaoro]] || [[word:jathapajaoro|jathapajaoro]] || [[word:jathapashaoro|jathapashaoro]] || [[word:jathapakaoro|jathapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
